description_long: This is a metallic kettle with a rounded, slightly conical body finished in a dark, marbled texture with visible scuff marks. The kettle features a prominent, arched handle wrapped in a black material, attached to the top with metallic connectors. A short, wide spout extends from one side, and a small, round, gold-colored knob sits atop a domed removable lid. The base is black and appears slightly raised, possibly indicating an integrated heating plate or insulation. Subtle gold accents are present on the handle connectors and the lid knob, adding a touch of elegance to the utilitarian design.
description: A dark, marbled metallic kettle with a domed lid, arched black handle, and gold accents, featuring a wide spout and a raised black base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout, arched handle, domed lid with gold knob, and marbled body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the handle's attachment and the marbled surface, with the spout not visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the spout fully visible, handle and lid details clear, and a gold accent on the base.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the handle, the lid, and the marbled body, with the spout attachment visible.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with gold knob
